title: Fiction-lite scenario: card between two clips with a J-cut audio lead
prompt: Assemble media/01_howmet.mp4, then a title card reading AND THEN, then media/10_married.mp4. Make the second clip's audio lead in under the card by about 1 second - a J-cut, so the voice pulls us through the card into the picture. Save the manifest as edit.json. Render to outputs/. Both clips are already trimmed answers - keep them whole.
